General.Name: Mühlbauer Holding AG
General.Description: Mühlbauer Holding AG engages in the production and personalization of smart cards, ePassports, solar cells, and RFID solutions in Germany, rest of Europe, Asia, the United States, Africa, and internationally. The company offers ID cards for governments, driver's licenses and vehicle registration cards, banking cards for secure transactions, gift and loyalty cards in high-volumes, health cards, and GSM cards for communication; ePassports; and semiconductor related products, such as die sorting, carrier tapes, LEDs Go Flexible, RFID/smart labels, flexible solar technology, and multicomponent flexible electronics. It also provides vision inspection products comprising TEMA security inspection and TEMA industrial inspection; precision parts; eMobility, flexible solar, and flexible electronics; consumables; and support services, as well as accessories that includes card measuring stations, UV-lamps, thread counters, color fans, tool trollies, and cardboard carton for cards. In addition, the company offers automation software solutions, such as MB PalaMax, a smart factory software solution that allows capturing of complete real time production data; and MB Image Enhancement, a software which provides for automated processing of live-captured or scanned portraits. Further, it provides ID card, e-passport, driver's license and vehicle registration, border control and document verification, e-government, production facility, and government software solutions. Mühlbauer Holding AG was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Roding, Germany.

1.Name: Mr. Josef Markus Muhlbauer
1.Title: Founder, Chairman of Supervisory Board, CEO & President
